# Nikhil R

> Personal website of Nikhil R, a product leader and investor writing about AI, markets, poker, crypto, security, and personal projects.

This index reflects the published source content through July 30, 2025. Article links are canonical and listed newest first.

## Start here

- [Home](https://rnikhil.com/): Current biography, career history, contact links, and the complete article index.
- [About](https://rnikhil.com/about/): Background, career history, and ways to contact Nikhil.
- [Projects](https://rnikhil.com/projects/): Selected software, AI, poker, security, and open-source projects.
- [Today I learned](https://rnikhil.com/til/): Shorter notes and links about recent technology developments.
